---
title: 'Gatewaypeople 1/18/2014 06:16 PM Sat Night Church'
date: '2014-01-18T16:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3195217882828602938'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/gatewaypeople-1182014-0616-pm-sat-night.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Church Notes'
---

Gatewaypeople 1/18/2014 06:16 PM<br />
<br />
2 Tim 3:16<br />
All Scripture is given by God.<br />
God Breathed<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
Ezekiel 37:1-<br />
Speak by the breath of God-prophecy<br />
<br />
Job<br />
<br />
1 Peter 3:7<br />
Men live with wives in understanding<br />
1:20-21 Scripture comes from God not men<br />
<br />
Psalm 33:6<br />
Gen 1:1-3<br />
Isaiah 55:11<br />
Exodus 15:8-10<br />
John 20:22 breathed on them<br />
Prov 4<br />
Gen 2:7<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
The Written Word<br />
&nbsp;- brings understanding<br />
&nbsp;- brings order<br />
&nbsp;- brings strength<br />
&nbsp;- brings life<br />
<br />
<br />
Holy Spirit what are you saying to me in this message?<br />
<br />
word first before journal.<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
